response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct song performance scenes (00:00-01:08 and 03:40-05:00) and conversational segments (01:09-03:39). 2. Detected 'RIDE ON TIME' in the first performance. Searched 'Ride on Time 山下達郎 lyrics', confirmed composer/singer Tatsuro Yamashita, and retrieved full lyrics. 3. Detected 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA' in the second performance. Searched 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA 影山ヒロノブ lyrics', confirmed composer Chiho Kiyooka, singer Hironobu Kageyama, and retrieved full lyrics. 4. Mapped all scenes chronologically with metadata and lyrics, following strict formatting constraints.
response.global_summary: The video showcases a lively musical performance featuring various VTubers. It includes a performance of 'Ride on Time' at the beginning, followed by interlude and skit segments, and concludes with a performance of 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA'.

scenes.description: The video starts with a musical performance of 'Ride on Time'. The performers are dancing and singing on a stage. Text 'RIDE ON TIME' appears on the screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
青い水平線を いま駆け抜けてく
とぎすまされた 時の流れ感じて
ときめきへと 動き出す世界は
忘れかけてた 遠い夢の訪れ

Ride On Time さまよう想いなら
やさしく受け止めて そっと包んで
Ride On Time 心に火を点けて
あふれる喜びに 拡がれ Ride On Time

僕の輝く未来 さあ回りハジメて
虚ろな日々も全て愛に溶け込む
何という朝今すぐ君のもと
届けに行こう 燃える心迷わず

Ride On Time 時よ走り出せ
愛よ光り出せ 目もくらむ程
Ride On Time 心に火を点けて
飛び立つ魂に送るよ Ride On Time
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Crossing through the blue horizon now
Feeling the passing of time, sharpened
To the excitement, the world begins to move
The visit of a distant dream I had almost forgotten

Ride On Time, if it's wandering thoughts
Accept them gently, and wrap them softly
Ride On Time, light a fire in your heart
Spreading to overflowing joy, Ride On Time

My shining future, come on, begin to turn
Even empty days melt into love
What a morning, I want to deliver it to you right now
I will go, my burning heart without hesitation

Ride On Time, let time run
Let love shine, to the point of dazzling
Ride On Time, light a fire in your heart
I'll send it to your soul taking flight, Ride On Time

scenes.description: An interlude segment featuring a logo animation and talking.
The VTubers engage in conversational skits and talking on stage. No singing occurs.
Performance of the song 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA'. The performers are singing and dancing. Text 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA' appears.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
光る 雲を突き抜け Fly Away (Fly Away)
からだじゅうに 広がるパノラマ
顔を 蹴られた地球が怒って (怒って)
火山を爆発させる
溶けた北極(こおり)の中に
恐竜がいたら 玉乗り仕込みたいね

CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
何が起きても気分は へのへのカッパ
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
胸がパチパチするほど 騒ぐ元気玉
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
頭カラッポの方が 夢詰め込める
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
笑顔ウルトラゼットで
今日もアイヤイヤイヤイヤイ...

Sparking!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Shining, piercing through the clouds, Fly Away (Fly Away)
A panorama spreading across my whole body
The earth that was kicked in the face gets angry (angry)
Making the volcanoes erupt
If there were dinosaurs in the melted North Pole (ice)
I'd want to try training them to ride a ball

CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
No matter what happens, my mood is 'Heno-heno-kappa'
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
My heart is bursting, like a restless Genki-dama
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
It's better to have an empty head
To pack it full of dreams
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
With a smile Ultra-Z
Today too, Ai-ya-ya-ya-yai...

Sparking!
